expectations.text: Adds request_id row to the middleware table in REFERENCE.md
expectations.evidence: Determined that request_id already existed in the table and made no changes. The row existed but the purpose description was not improved.

expectations.text: Uses the correct three-column format matching existing entries (Name, Config Key, Purpose)
expectations.evidence: No modifications were made; existing format was implicitly preserved.

expectations.text: The new entry is placed in a consistent position (alphabetical or end of table)
expectations.evidence: No modifications were made; existing position was implicitly preserved.

expectations.text: Does not modify any other part of REFERENCE.md beyond the middleware table
Updates README.md if the middleware table there is also affected, or explains why no update is needed
expectations.evidence: Correctly determined README.md is a TOC without individual middleware entries, so no update needed.
